title: Introduction to R for SPSS Users: DCDC Network Training Materials
description: A hands-on workshop designed for researchers, students, and institutional staff who currently use SPSS and want to transition to R. The course maps common SPSS workflows to R equivalents, covering data manipulation with tidyverse, visualization with ggplot2, statistical analysis, and reproducible reporting with R Markdown. Uses Dutch Caribbean datasets as teaching examples. Developed by the DCDC Network at the University of Aruba.
